items.title: Upgrade husky to version 9.1.7 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the husky dependency from version 7.0.4 to 9.1.7, enhancing the project's pre-commit hook functionality. Key changes include improved deprecation notices and fixes for various issues, ensuring a smoother development experience. The update also introduces new contributors who have made valuable contributions to the husky project.

items.title: Enhance SKALE Environment Variables in x402 Deployment 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces SKALE RPC and signer environment variable mappings to the facilitator's production deployment. The deployment environment has been aligned with the existing multichain SKALE handler support, while keeping SKALE environment variables optional to facilitate a smoother rollout. These changes aim to improve the integration and functionality of the x402 deployment.

items.title: Enhance SKALE Integration in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new runtime settings for SKALE, including `X402_SKALE_PAY_TO` and `X402_SKALE_USDC_ASSET`. It modifies the x402 payment requirements to support SKALE transactions, ensuring clients can successfully complete the verify/settle flow. Additionally, environment variables for SKALE have been wired in the production deployment, along with new tests to validate the integration.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Connector Management UI in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the OAuth Connector management UI, allowing users to connect and disconnect various OAuth providers like Google, GitHub, and Slack. Key components include a new dialog for managing connections and a callback page for handling OAuth responses. Additionally, the update enhances existing chat functionalities by integrating connector support and improving internationalization for multiple languages.

items.title: Enhance aichat2 with OAuth Connectors for Google, GitHub, and Slack in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces OAuth connectors for Google, GitHub, and Slack in aichat2, allowing users to seamlessly integrate their accounts. Users can now search Google Drive, manage GitHub repositories, and interact with Slack channels directly through the AI assistant. The implementation includes new handlers, persistence layers, and security measures for token management.

items.title: Enhance billing management for connectors API in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a billing skip feature for the new OAuth Connectors API endpoint. The connector API ID has been added to the billing check logic, ensuring that all CRUD operations for connectors do not incur billing charges. This change aligns with the ongoing development of the AI Orchestrator's Phase 4.

items.title: Enable nano-banana CDN transfer by default in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update changes the default setting for the nano-banana CDN transfer to enabled, while still allowing users to opt-out by setting `ENABLE_NANOBANANA_CDN_TRANSFER=false`. The existing environment variable override semantics for explicit disable have been preserved. This change aims to enhance the default behavior for CDN transfers in the Platform Service.

items.title: Unified x402 Gateway Responses to v2 Schema in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the x402 gateway responses to conform to the v2 schema by changing the `x402Version` to 2. Additionally, it replaces `maxAmountRequired` with `amount` in payment requirements while keeping other metadata intact. These changes enhance consistency and clarity in the API responses.

items.title: Enhance CQTai Resilience in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the CQTai client by reducing the retry sleep duration from 1000 seconds to just 1 second, addressing unit misuse. Additionally, the shared axios client timeout is set to 30 seconds to prevent indefinite request hangs while maintaining the same behavior for successful paths. These changes significantly reduce the risk of stuck requests.

items.title: Unify x402 Requirements to v2 Fields in x402 🚀
items.summary: This update switches the `/supported` response to use `x402Version: 2` and modifies the Base/Solana chain handlers to prioritize reading `amount` with a fallback to `maxAmountRequired`. Additionally, facilitator tests have been aligned with the new v2 payload and requirements keys, ensuring consistency across the codebase.

items.title: Enhance Task Previews with Full Text Display in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the single-line ellipsis truncation from the prompt and title displays across all 15 AI service task preview components. Key changes include adjustments to the CSS properties, allowing for full text wrapping and improved readability. The modifications enhance user experience by ensuring that all relevant information is visible without truncation.

items.title: Enhance Image Aspect Ratio Detection in Platform Service 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a new utility function, `snapToNearestAspectRatio()`, which adjusts detected aspect ratios to the nearest supported value, ensuring compatibility with the upstream cqtai API. Additionally, the list of supported aspect ratios has been expanded to include new values like `1:4`, `1:8`, `4:1`, and `8:1`. This enhancement improves image editing reliability and user experience.

items.title: Standardize Sidebar Logo to Platform Favicon in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update ensures that the sidebar logo consistently uses the platform favicon from a fixed URL, rather than loading it dynamically from site configuration. This change simplifies the logo management and enhances the visual consistency across the application.

items.title: Enhance nanobanana prompt display in Nexior 🎉
items.summary: This update removes the single-line ellipsis in the nanobanana task preview, allowing the prompt text to wrap and display fully. The changes ensure a better user experience by improving text visibility. All modifications have been verified with no Vue file errors.

items.title: Enhance Chat with MCP Server Management in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new MCP (Model Context Protocol) server management UI to the chat interface. Key features include the ability to add, edit, delete, and test remote MCP servers, along with a dedicated dialog for managing these servers. Additionally, the chat header now displays a button with a badge indicating the count of enabled servers, enhancing user experience and functionality.

items.title: Skip Billing for Aichat2 MCP Servers in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a feature that allows all management operations for Aichat2 MCP servers to bypass billing checks. The relevant API ID and Kong service have been specified, ensuring that operations like create, list, update, delete, and test are free of charge. This change is part of Phase 3 of the AI Orchestrator project, enhancing the efficiency of MCP Connectors.

items.title: Update typescript-cookie to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the typescript-cookie package from version 1.0.3 to 1.0.6. Key improvements include better TypeScript type imports and the addition of package provenance for npm publishing. These changes enhance compatibility and reliability in our frontend application.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Icons to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/free-brands-svg-icons package from version 6.7.2 to 7.2.0. Key changes include improvements and new features from the latest release, enhancing the icon library available for use in the project.

items.title: Update FontAwesome Vue Component to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @fortawesome/vue-fontawesome package from version 3.0.2 to 3.1.3. Key changes include the removal of Jest in favor of Vitest for improved test performance, updates to FontAwesomeIconProps, and various dependency updates. These enhancements will ensure better compatibility and performance within the Vue 3 + Vite ecosystem.

items.title: Update qs dependency to version 6.15.0 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the qs library from version 6.14.0 to 6.15.0. Key improvements include the addition of a strictMerge option for parsing conflicts and fixes to the duplicates option for bracket notation keys. These changes enhance the robustness and functionality of query string parsing in the application.

items.title: Enhance Chat with Tool-Calling UI in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update migrates chat API calls to the new `/aichat2/conversations` endpoint, enabling enhanced tool-calling capabilities. A new ToolActivity component has been added to display tool calls inline, complete with loading indicators and success/error statuses. The chat model has been updated to support tool-related fields, improving the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance Python Expression Output in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves the sandbox code execution tool by enabling output for bare Python expressions. It utilizes AST transformation to automatically print the result of the last expression, ensuring that users see the computed results instead of '(no output)'. Key changes include handling various edge cases such as print statements and syntax errors.

items.title: Update Solana Wallet Adapter to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @solana/wallet-adapter-wallets package from version 0.19.37 to 0.19.38. Key changes include updated dependencies for Solflare and Phantom wallets, enhancing compatibility and performance. This ensures a smoother experience for users interacting with Solana wallets.

items.title: Update xterm web links addon to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @xterm/addon-web-links package from version 0.11.0 to 0.12.0. Key changes include improvements and new documentation visuals, enhancing the overall user experience. The package updates are reflected in both package.json and yarn.lock files.
